name: spaceface
description: SpaceFace — a semi-3D top-down space trading/combat/mining game (Three.js).

scripts.check:sg02: npm run check:sg02:intake && npm run check:physics-authority
scripts.check:art: node scripts/check-kestrel-asset.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-hero.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-silhouette.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-damage.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-leak.mjs && node scripts/check-lod.mjs && node scripts/check-collision-debug.mjs && node scripts/check-concord-patrol.mjs && node scripts/check-reaver-pirate.mjs && node scripts/check-faction-ships.mjs
scripts.check: node scripts/check-data.mjs && node scripts/check-data-refs.mjs && npm run check:balance && npm run check:sg02 && npm run check:combat && node scripts/check-ui-screen-imports.mjs && node scripts/check-ui-a11y.mjs && npm run check:contracts && npm run check:presentation && node scripts/check-gameplay-core.mjs && npm run check:sim && npm run check:sim:compare && npm run check:sim:profile && npm run check:sim:long && node scripts/check-phase0-slice-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-sectorSim.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-asset.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-hero.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-silhouette.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-damage.mjs && node scripts/check-kestrel-leak.mjs && node scripts/check-lod.mjs && node scripts/check-collision-debug.mjs && node scripts/check-concord-patrol.mjs && node scripts/check-reaver-pirate.mjs && node scripts/check-faction-ships.mjs
